note: Ranks 1-20 preserve the historical CrystaLLM-a GT-SG anchor policy. Ranks 21-100 are expanded candidate pools with multiple temperatures/top-k values. Normalized token logprob is not emitted by the upstream generator yet and must be backfilled before rerank feature freezing.
